title: ADR CRITIQUE output — verdict + blocking issues on rendered ADR set

aprd_ref.description: Resolved aPRD artifact path; constraint oracle

foundation_cut_ref.description: Path to foundation cut; deferred oracle

adrs_reviewed.description: Every ADR-NNNN from adr-index.adrs[], in id order; len == len(adr-index.adrs[])

verdict.description: Exactly clean | blocked; blocked iff issues non-empty, else clean

issues.description: Blocking-grade issues only; empty on clean set

category.description: Exactly one of seven blocking categories

target_adr.description: ADR-NNNN concerned; 'none' for uncovered-constraint when ADR is absent

finding.description: What is wrong and why it blocks freeze; cites concrete ADR + aPRD/cut ids

fix_hint.description: Concrete actionable change to clear this issue; not 'make it better'

critique_counts.description: Walk issues to count; don't estimate

by_category.description: Tallies issues per category; sums to issue_count
